question: Which of the following is not part of the condition of the UAPL theory test?

options.text: An applicant passes the theory test if the applicant achieves a test score of at least 75%.
An applicant is not eligible to attempt the theory test more than 2 times within a period of one month.
A pass in the theory test shall be valid for 24 months from the date on which the theory test was attempted.
An applicant can be exempted from the theory test if he has a valid commercial pilot license for manned aircraft.
